parameters latualiza

WITH thisform.pagina.dados.pagina.CADASTRO.olegru
	cleft = .Left
	ctop = .top
	.left = 2000
	.top = 2000
	thisform.LockScreen = .T. 

	IF !latualiza
		.nodes.clear
	ENDIF
	SELECT crGruAce
	SCAN
		nreg = RECNO()
		IF !latualiza
			.nodes.Add(,1,ALLTRIM(STR(nreg) + "_"),crGruAce.grupos,0)	
		ENDIF
		.nodes.item(ALLTRIM(STR(nreg) + "_")).Checked = IIF(crGruAce.marca=1,.t.,.f.)		
	ENDSCAN
	
	.left = cleft
	.top = ctop
	.Refresh()
	thisform.LockScreen = .F.
ENDWITH
